heading: Scope of authority to carry out plant projects
label: 6279 Scope of authority to carry out plant projects
text: In carrying out programs necessary for national security, the authority of the Secretary of Energy to carry out plant projects includes authority for maintenance, restoration, planning, construction, acquisition, modification of facilities, and the continuation of projects authorized in prior years, and land acquisition related thereto.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2748 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)
